Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportGroupItem

An item in the list of learning objective report items in the current group.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
LearningObjectiveId

Gets or sets the learning objective identifier.

 integer

None.
Title

Gets or sets the title.

 string

None.
Description

Gets or sets the description.

 string

None.
Status

Gets or sets the status.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningObjectiveProgressReport.ReportAssessmentStatus

None.
Mastered

Gets or sets a value indicating whether this is mastered.

 boolean

None.
MasteredDate

Gets or sets the mastered date. Can be null if item is not mastered.

 date

None.
